description: Create or update an external identity key in the authenticated user's ATProto repo.

main.description: Store an auxiliary cryptographic public key for cross-network identity bridging (Meshtastic, Nostr, WireGuard, SSH, etc.).

rkey.description: Record key identifier (1-512 chars, alphanumeric + hyphens).

purpose.description: Target network or use case (1-64 chars). Examples: meshtastic, nostr, wireguard, ssh, device.

publicKey.description: Public key in did:key multibase format (base58btc, z prefix).

uri.description: AT URI of the created/updated record.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing required fields or validation failed.

errors.name: InvalidPublicKey
errors.description: Public key format invalid or multicodec prefix doesn't match type.
